plan_summary.plan_name: Yellowstone Caldera Red Warning Evacuation (Pioneer Strategy)
plan_summary.primary_goal: Clear 35,800 Zone Zero occupants within 6 hours and bridge the T+6 to T+18 logistical ingress gap with airlifted N95/water supplies while keeping decentralized C2 nodes powered for 72 hours.
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Tests three executable viability gates: Zone Zero contraflow throughput vs the T+6 deadline, T+8 to T+16 airlift staging vs the 30% N95 target, and C2 72-hour fuel cache vs the UPS baseline. Stafford Act, FAA/DoD airspace waiver, and tri-state Governor MOU are treated as unmodelled authorisation gates.

key_values.label: Zone Zero population (tourists + staff)
key_values.comment: Combined evacuee count (35,000 tourists + 800 staff) that contraflow throughput must clear by T+6 hours.
key_values.source_text: Zone Zero contains 35,000 visitors and 800 essential staff

key_values.label: Zone Zero clearance window
key_values.comment: Hard deadline for 98% Zone Zero egress; missing it triggers Phase 2 failure and VEI-7 contingency risk.
key_values.source_text: Zone Zero population clear by T+6 hours deadline

key_values.label: Zone Zero clearance success threshold
key_values.comment: Success metric: 98% of registered vehicles must exit final checkpoint by T+6 or Pioneer Strategy fails Phase 1.
key_values.source_text: 98% of registered vehicles exiting the final checkpoint

key_values.label: Authorised heavy-lift helicopter sorties
key_values.comment: Total CH-47-class sorties allowed in T+8 to T+16 ingress window for N95/water airlift to Bozeman and Idaho Falls.

key_values.label: Required airlift staging fraction by T+16
key_values.comment: Threshold: 30% of T+18 N95/water requirement must be staged at Bozeman/Idaho Falls by T+16 via authorised sorties.
key_values.source_text: 30% of T+18 water/N95 requirement at staging areas by T+16

key_values.label: Required C2 fuel cache duration
key_values.comment: Each of three decentralised C2 nodes must sustain 72 hours of external diesel/JP-8 power before resupply.
key_values.source_text: secure 72 hours of external diesel/JP-8 power cache for C2 sites

key_values.label: Zone One N95 respirator requirement
key_values.comment: Total N95 units to pre-stage for Zone One respiratory protection; sets airlift payload requirement.
key_values.source_text: Respiratory protection for 100,000 people as N95 minimum

derived_questions.question: Does the tri-state dual-hat MOU resolve early enough to keep engineering on the 72-hour cache schedule?
derived_questions.why_it_matters: Late MOU signing causes a 4-12 hour ashfall-hardening delay that cascades into grid collapse and C2 power loss.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Contraflow vehicle throughput rate
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Determines whether US-191/US-20 contraflow can clear the required vehicle count within the T+6 window.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: FHWA contraflow lane studies (1,800-2,400 vph per lane) times number of contraflow lanes available.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Average occupants per evacuating vehicle
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Converts vehicle throughput to people throughput so the T+6 clearance constraint can be tested.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Tourist destination vehicle-occupancy norms (2.5-3.5 people/vehicle in family-park settings).

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Payload capacity per CH-47 sortie
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Combined with sortie count and item mass it determines whether 30% staging by T+16 is mechanically achievable.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: CH-47F internal/external lift specs (8,000-12,000 kg per sortie) derated for ash visibility.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: C2 node UPS-only baseline duration
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Sets the floor the 72-hour cache must exceed; without it the cache-vs-UPS surplus cannot be evaluated.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: USGS-style hardened-node UPS rating (24-48 hours) per review-plan and expert-criticism notes.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Required evacuee throughput per hour
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Anchors the Phase 1 gate: contraflow must move at least this many people per hour or Zone Zero clearance fails.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Achievable evacuee throughput from contraflow
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Bottom-up evacuee throughput from contraflow lane capacity; compared against the required rate to test Phase 1 viability.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Evacuation throughput surplus
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive surplus means contraflow can clear Zone Zero by T+6; negative means Phase 1 fails and VEI-7 contingency risk rises.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Airlift staging payload surplus
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests whether 10 sorties can deliver 30% of the 100k N95 mass (0.05 kg/unit) within the T+8 to T+16 window.

recommended_first_calculations.label: C2 fuel cache duration surplus vs UPS baseline
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests whether the 72-hour cache plan clears the UPS-only baseline so command continuity is preserved past T+48.

unmodelled_gates.label: Stafford Act declaration for $500M DRF access
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Without the declaration, the $500M DRF ceiling is unreachable and every financed component of the plan stalls.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: All airlift, fuel cache, shelter intake, and contractor mobilisation funding stalls; the Pioneer Strategy cannot execute.

unmodelled_gates.label: FAA/DoD airspace waiver for T+8 to T+16 ingress
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: The 10 emergency sorties depend on a waiver against the silicate-ash grounding of ZLC/ZSE; without it the airlift cannot launch.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: 30% N95/water staging by T+16 cannot occur and Zone One faces respiratory/dehydration casualty surge.

unmodelled_gates.label: MT/WY/ID Governor dual-hat MOU before T+0
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Engineering tasking for fuel caches and ash hardening requires signed tri-state operational authority before boundary crossing.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Jurisdictional friction delays ashfall hardening 4-12 hours, raising grid collapse probability and C2 failure risk.
